title: Generative AI is finally finding its sweet spot, says Databricks chief AI scientist
desc: As generative AI begins helping solve real-world problems, a new kind of data analytics is emerging, says Jonathan Frankle.

desc: Google says it's found a sweet spot between power and efficiency by employing the 'distillation' of neural nets.

desc: If you've gotten cash from an ATM, you've interacted with a COBOL-based system. Here's why this old programming language will probably outlive us all.
